name: Hive Mind
description: The Hive Mind is a Legendary Gearbox launcher from Borderlands 1 Enhanced Edition that fires three rockets in rapid succession per trigger pull. You can stop the burst early by reloading or meleeing to conserve ammo.

special.description: Fires a 3-round burst of rockets with increased damage and magazine size but slower reload speed.
special.title: That's gonna leave a Marx
